metadata.title: Kalebtec | Software architecture, web & AI consulting
metadata.description: Software architecture, web platforms, and AI automation by a small team led by Rowin and Mari Hernandez. We build software that lasts.

metadata.projectsTitle: Our work — Kalebtec software & engineering projects

hero.headline: Engineering with intent.
hero.subhead: Software architecture, web platforms, and AI automation, built by a small team that ships.

about.originStory: We didn't start Kalebtec in a boardroom. We started it at a kitchen table, late at night, fueled by bad coffee and a shared obsession with building things that actually work.
about.teamDescription: <rowin>Rowin</rowin> writes the code. <mari>Mari</mari> runs the show. Together, we take messy, complex technical challenges and turn them into clean, scalable systems that businesses can actually rely on.
about.directAttention: We're not a faceless agency. Every project gets our direct attention -- hands on keyboards, eyes on screens, zero layers of middle management between us and your product. When you work with Kalebtec, you work with us.
about.philosophy: We believe great technology should feel invisible -- fast, reliable, and so well-built that people forget it's even there. No bloated frameworks for the sake of trends. No overengineered solutions to simple problems. Just sharp, purposeful engineering that gets the job done.

softwareArchitecture.name: Software Architecture
softwareArchitecture.description: We design scalable, maintainable systems built for growth. From microservices to monoliths, we choose the right architecture for your needs.

webDevelopment.name: Web Development
webDevelopment.description: Modern web applications built with cutting-edge technology. Fast, accessible, and beautiful by default.

aiAutomation.name: AI & Automation
aiAutomation.description: Leverage artificial intelligence and automation to streamline operations and unlock new possibilities.

cloudInfrastructure.name: Cloud Infrastructure
cloudInfrastructure.description: Cloud-native solutions on AWS, GCP, and Azure. We optimize for performance, security, and cost.

technicalStrategy.name: Technical Strategy
technicalStrategy.description: Align your technology decisions with business goals. We provide roadmaps that drive real results.

teamAugmentation.name: Team Augmentation
teamAugmentation.description: Embed senior engineers directly into your team. We scale with you when you need it most.

projects.subtitle: Featured builds from our portfolio

projects.noResults: No projects match the selected filters.

rowin.description: The one who talks to machines. Rowin builds full-stack systems from the ground up -- databases, APIs, interfaces, infrastructure. If it runs on code, he's already halfway through the architecture. Obsessed with clean abstractions, fast deploys, and making complex things feel simple.

mari.description: The one who makes sure it all actually happens. Mari orchestrates projects, wrangles timelines, and keeps every engagement running like a well-oiled machine. She's the reason deadlines get hit and clients stay happy. Sharp instincts, zero tolerance for chaos.

contact.subtitle: Ready to transform your technology? Let's talk.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for Kalebtec technology consulting services. Read about our service terms, limitations, and user responsibilities.
terms.effectiveDate: Effective Date: March 9, 2026 — Last Updated: March 9, 2026

section1.label: Agreement
section1.title: Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By accessing or using the Kalebtec website (kalebtec.com) and our technology consulting services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website or services. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Kalebtec, operated by Rowin Hernandez and Mari Hernandez.

section2.label: Services
section2.title: Description of Services
section2.content: Kalebtec provides technology consulting services including but not limited to:
section2.contentAfter: The specific scope of services for each engagement will be defined in a separate statement of work or service agreement between Kalebtec and the client.

section3.label: User obligations
section3.title: User Responsibilities
section3.content: When using our website and services, you agree to:
section3.item1: Provide accurate and complete information when contacting us or engaging our services
section3.item2: Not use our website for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable laws
section3.item3: Not attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or infrastructure
section3.item4: Not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from our website content without permission
section3.item5: Respect the intellectual property rights of Kalebtec and its clients

section4.label: Ip rights
section4.title: Intellectual Property
section4.content1: All content on the Kalebtec website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, design elements, 3D visuals, animations, code, and software, is the property of Kalebtec and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
section4.content2: Intellectual property rights for client deliverables will be governed by the specific terms outlined in each project's statement of work or service agreement. Unless otherwise agreed in writing, Kalebtec retains the right to showcase completed work in its portfolio.

section5.label: Confidentiality
section5.title: Confidentiality
section5.content: Kalebtec acknowledges that in the course of providing consulting services, we may receive confidential information from clients. We commit to maintaining the confidentiality of such information and will not disclose it to third parties without the client's prior written consent, except as required by law. Specific confidentiality terms may be established in individual service agreements or non-disclosure agreements.

section6.label: Payment
section6.title: Payment Terms
section6.content: Payment terms, rates, and schedules for consulting services will be outlined in individual project agreements or statements of work. Unless otherwise specified, invoices are due within thirty (30) days of issuance. Kalebtec reserves the right to suspend services for overdue payments. Late payments may be subject to reasonable interest charges as specified in the applicable service agreement.

section7.label: Liability
section7.title: Limitation of Liability
section7.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Kalebtec shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, use, or goodwill, arising out of or in connection with:
section7.item1: Your use of or inability to use our website or services
section7.item2: Any errors or omissions in our website content
section7.item3: Unauthorized access to or alteration of your data
section7.item4: Any third-party content or services accessed through our website
section7.contentAfter: Our total liability for any claims arising from our services shall not exceed the total fees paid by the client for the specific engagement giving rise to the claim.

section8.label: Warranties
section8.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
section8.content: Our website and its content are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. Kalebtec does not warrant that the website will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components. Specific warranties for consulting services will be defined in individual service agreements.

section9.label: Termination
section9.title: Termination
section9.content: We reserve the right to terminate or restrict your access to our website at any time, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms of Service or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties. Termination of consulting service engagements will be governed by the terms outlined in individual service agreements.

section10.label: Governing law
section10.title: Governing Law
section10.content: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising under these terms shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation, and if necessary, binding arbitration in accordance with applicable rules.

section11.label: Modifications
section11.title: Changes to Terms
section11.content: Kalebtec reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to this page. We will update the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page when changes are made. Your continued use of our website or services after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for Kalebtec. Learn about how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.effectiveDate: Effective Date: March 9, 2026 — Last Updated: March 9, 2026

section1.label: Overview
section1.title: Introduction
section1.content: Kalebtec ("we", "us", or "our"), operated by Rowin Hernandez and Mari Hernandez, is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website (kalebtec.com) or use our technology consulting services. Please read this policy carefully. By using our website or services, you consent to the practices described herein.

section2.label: Data collection
section2.title: Information We Collect
section2.content: We may collect information about you in several ways:
section2.personalDataContent: Information you voluntarily provide to us when contacting us or engaging our services, including:
section2.personalItem1: Name and contact information (email address, phone number)
section2.personalItem3: Project details and requirements shared through our contact form
section2.personalItem4: Billing and payment information for service engagements
section2.autoDataContent: When you visit our website, we may automatically collect certain information, including:
section2.autoItem1: IP address and approximate geographic location
section2.autoItem4: Pages visited and time spent on each page

section3.label: Data usage
section3.title: How We Use Your Information
section3.content: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
section3.item1: To respond to your inquiries and provide requested services
section3.item2: To deliver and manage our consulting engagements
section3.item3: To process payments and send invoices
section3.item4: To improve our website, services, and user experience
section3.item5: To communicate updates about our services or this policy

section4.label: Cookies
section4.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section4.content: Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience. Cookies are small data files stored on your device.
section4.essentialDesc: Required for the website to function properly (e.g., theme preference, cookie consent status)
section4.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website so we can improve it
section4.controlContent: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect some website functionality. We also use localStorage to persist your theme preference and cookie consent choice.

section5.label: Third parties
section5.title: Third-Party Services
section5.content: We may use third-party services that collect, monitor, and analyze data to improve our website and services. These third parties have their own privacy policies addressing how they use such information. Third-party services we may use include:
section5.contentAfter: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties for marketing purposes.

section6.label: Data security
section6.title: Data Security
section6.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security. We use industry-standard encryption (HTTPS/TLS) for all data transmitted between your browser and our servers.

section7.label: Data retention
section7.title: Data Retention
section7.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. Contact information submitted through our website is retained for the duration of our business relationship and for a reasonable period thereafter to address any follow-up inquiries.

section8.label: Your rights
section8.title: Your Rights
section8.content: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal data, including:
section8.item1: The right to access the personal data we hold about you
section8.item2: The right to request correction of inaccurate data
section8.item3: The right to request deletion of your personal data
section8.item4: The right to object to or restrict processing of your data
section8.item6: The right to withdraw consent at any time
section8.contentAfterPre: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
section8.contentAfterPost: . We will respond to your request within a reasonable timeframe.

section9.label: Children
section9.title: Children's Privacy
section9.contentPre: Our website and services are not directed at individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information, we will take steps to delete such information promptly. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a child, please contact us at

section10.label: Modifications
section10.title: Changes to This Policy
section10.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Your continued use of our website or services after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
